data.title: Bitfarms (BITF) gains ISS support for U.S. redomiciliation vote. ISS advises yes ahead of March 20 vote. BITF stock rises by 12%.
data.description: The Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has suggested that shareholders of Bitfarms approve the company's redomiciliation to the United States before the March 20 vote. This news has caused an increase in BITF stock by 12%. Bitfarms is also gearing up for a rebrand to Keel Infrastructure.

data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline amid a surge in oil prices, with a notable increase in the performance of AI leader Broadcom due to strong earnings. The market report covers this development with live coverage.

data.title: Evaxion Earnings Report: Q4 Overview
data.description: Evaxion (NASDAQ: EVAX) disclosed its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 09:28 AM. The key highlights from this release include surpassing estimated earnings by 89.47%, with an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the expected $-0.19. Revenue experienced a decrease of $122,000 from the corresponding period in the previous year. For further details on the earnings report, refer to the complete coverage accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Compliance Group Achieves ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Certification, Strengthening Responsible AI Governance for Regulated Industries
data.description: A Chicago-based company, Compliance Group (CG), specializing in technology-driven services for regulated life sciences firms, has recently obtained ISO/IEC 42001:2023 certification. This certification, which denotes compliance with the international standard for Artificial Intelligence Management Systems (AIMS), confirms that CG operates under an audited AI Management System in line with the global AI governance standard. With the rapid growth of AI in regulatory settings, this certification showcases CG's commitment to maintaining standards and best practices in this realm.

data.title: Christian & Timbers Launches CT Labs to Help Enterprises Deploy ROI-First AI at Production Scale
data.description: A new enterprise AI strategy consulting and delivery platform called CT Labs has been launched by Christian & Timbers in San Francisco. CT Labs is designed to assist organizations in moving from pilots to production-grade Agentic systems, focusing on copilots, LLMs, and automation. This platform caters to enterprises aiming to achieve measurable business impact through AI but facing challenges in translating experimentation into results. Unlike other AI consulting firms that concentrate on ideation and proof of concept, CT Labs aims to guide companies towards deploying fully operational AI systems successfully.

data.title: Nurses, PSWs among 55 layoffs at Bruyere Health – CUPE blames Ford government for underfunding, to hold press conference on March 9
data.description: In Ottawa, Bruyere Health is facing challenges due to significant funding reductions by the local government. This has led to the decision to lay off a total of 55 frontline staff members, consisting of 46 personal support workers and nine nurses. The Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) has expressed concerns regarding these cuts, emphasizing the impact on patient care as staffing levels are already insufficient. Douglas Currier, the president of CUPE 4540 and a registered practical nurse, highlighted his surprise at the news, stating that the decision to cut jobs in a healthcare setting where care is already compromised is bewildering.

data.title: 'Ripple Is Next For Fed Access,' XRP Commentator Says—But Is That True?
data.description: Crypto commentator Paul Barron suggests that Ripple may be next in line to receive access to the Federal Reserve master account, following Kraken's recent approval. However, critics highlight the significant difference in application timelines, with Kraken applying in 2020 and Ripple not applying until 2025. Kraken recently made history by becoming the first crypto company in the U.S. to secure access to the Fedwire payment infrastructure through a limited-purpose account approved by the Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City. Kraken's application process lasted over five years, attributed to regulatory delays under the Biden administration in granting crypto banking access. Despite the milestone approval, Kraken's account comes with restrictions such as no interest on reserves and no access to emergency lending facilities. The initial term for the account is one year, with services gradually being introduced. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: INVESTIGATION NOTICE: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Aquestive Therapeutics
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Aquestive Therapeutics to reach out to him for a discussion on their options. If you have suffered notable losses in Aquestive Therapeutics stock or options, please contact James Wilson directly to explore potential avenues for recourse.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Professional Bev Best Breaks Down What to Know About Buying a Cabin in Pinetop-Lakeside
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Pinetop, Arizona, a recent HelloNation article provided valuable insights on important considerations for prospective buyers looking to purchase a cabin in the White Mountains region. Real Estate Professional Bev Best from The Best Team at Realty Executives in Arizona shared expert advice in the article. Potential buyers are advised to carefully assess practical matters before investing in a cabin in this area. The guidance covers essential factors such as location advantages, property condition, pricing trends, and other crucial aspects to ensure a wise investment choice. This informative piece aims to help buyers make informed decisions as they navigate the real estate market in the White Mountains.

The company surpassed expected earnings by 89.47%, posting an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the estimated $-0.19. Revenue saw a decrease of $122,000 from the previous year.
